choices.text: Automatic. China mining ban May 2021: hash rate dropped 50%; block time slowed to 15 min; difficulty auto-adjusted -28% within 6 weeks (largest in history). Network recovered without intervention.

questions.explanation: Difficulty auto-adjusts every 2016 blocks for self-healing.

choices.text: Transaction fees must dominate as block reward → 0 by ~2140. Fees today 1-10% of miner revenue; must grow with usage + BTC price. Open question: are fees sustainable? Layer-2 (Lightning) absorbs small txs; L1 becomes settlement for high-value.

questions.explanation: Fees must dominate as reward goes to zero.
